test: apps/benchmark/tests/controller.test.ts > exhausts an M2 provider pool through per-call conservative settlements

rootCause.productionAlgorithm: Every durable append reparses and revalidates the complete hash-chained ledger. The frozen held-out fixture performed 108 accepted reserve/settle cycles, so the test created 216 reservation events while repeatedly validating a growing ledger.

preservedAssertions: each complete worst-case reservation succeeds until exact provider-pool exhaustion
each zero-observed-cost conservative settlement charges the complete reservation
consumed, conservative, observed, and unknown-usage accounting remain exact

additionalGateFinding.test: apps/benchmark/tests/m3b1.test.ts > derives fresh provider, pricing, transport, and phase identities
additionalGateFinding.correction: Preserve the complete held-out materialization and every assertion; increase only this integration test's local timeout from 20000 to 30000 ms.
